description_long: This house is a modern, two-story residential building with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior features a combination of white and light gray surfaces, with large windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, allowing for ample natural light. A spacious front porch with a low fence and landscaped greenery adds to the curb appeal, while a driveway leads to a side parking area. The rear of the house includes a patio or deck area, partially shaded by overhangs and surrounded by additional greenery. The structure is set on a well-maintained grassy lot, bordered by paved walkways and driveways. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large asymmetrical windows, and a spacious porch, set on a grassy lot with paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entryway, large windows, and a welcoming porch with landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the driveway, side entrance, and the rear patio area with greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back patio, additional windows, and the fenced yard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the porch, side windows, and the driveway leading to the parking area.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, steps, a covered porch, and minimalistic landscaping
